title: erysimum tenuifilium
intro: Erysimum tenuifilium, also known as blue alyssum or wormwood alyssum, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming the plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and improving sleep quality, as well as supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
